svg.title: Split panel: ransomware operator with one key vs vibe coder surrounded by specific technical sprawl
svg.desc: Left panel shows a calm figure, one key, one target — deliberate, controlled. Right panel shows a figure surrounded by scattered labeled tech components: microVMs, ChromaDB, leaked API key, auth flows, background daemon, router logs, unknown topology.
svg.text: 12 / 12 ransomware operators trust humans for the real work.
Every new component = new attack surface.
Not more doors. A different building.
Calling experts: please help save me from myself.
